title: Birmingham, England — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Birmingham, England: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Birmingham is a city in England with a population of 1,144,919. The UK’s second-largest city with a rich industrial heritage, diverse culture, and some of the most affordable housing in England.

Last updated: July 09, 2026
